temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, cluttered room, three men in black suits stand with their arms outstretched, pointing wands forward. The man in the center, with platinum blonde hair, is the focus, his expression serious and determined. The man to his left has a stern, intense look, while the man on the right is partially obscured but also appears focused. The room is filled with various objects, including what looks like a collection of old mirrors and a metal table with a silver pitcher. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense confrontation, showing the antagonists in a classic 'Harry Potter' style standoff, ready to duel.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of Harry Potter. He is wearing a brown corduroy shirt over a grey t-shirt and has a determined, almost defiant expression on his face. He stares directly forward, unflinching. (Storyline: This cut introduces the protagonist, Harry Potter, showing his resolve and courage in the face of the threat posed by the men with wands.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Calm, steady, and confident. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful score continues.)
